title: The Agriculturists' Loans Act, 1884
full_text: The Agriculturists' Loans Act, 1884 कृषक उधार अधिनियम, 1884 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188412 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1884-07-24 Act Year: 1884 Short Title: The Agriculturists' Loans Act, 1884 Hindi Title: कृषक उधार अधिनियम, 1884 Long Title: An Act to amend and provide for the extension of the Northern India Takkavi Act, 1879. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Local extent. Section 3. Repeal of Act X of 1879, and section 4 and 5 of Act XV of 1880. Section 4. Power for State Government to make rules. Section 5. Recovery of loans. Section 6. Liability of joint-borrowers as among themselves.
